Hey, I've got an incredibly awesome bonus for you. What it is, is this is sort of like a

First, I'll cover why, and that's what I'm going to talk about in this video, and then,
what it actually looks like when you do one of these promotions and when you should
do it. Then, I'll give you the how to do it. Then, at the end of the video I've got a
special invitation for you that I think might be a pretty cool thing for you.
Why promote? Why promote someone else's launch? One reason is it's like the
quickest way for you to get money. You don't have to create a product, you don't
have to put together a launch, you just put together a relatively simple promotion for
someone else. That can be very, very lucrative. I've had times where I've supported
launches, and I think we've done a quarter of million dollars, or even more, from
promoting a launch. Of course, I've got a big list, I've got a lot of assets I could
deploy, so not everyone is going to do that right off the bat, but it's amazing how
lucrative this could be.
It could be really a great way to bring in some money, especially if you're starting out.
If you're starting out, even if you don't have a list, you've still got some influence
among some people, I'm willing to bet, even if it's one-on-one, word of mouth. If
you're just absolutely starting out, this could be the quickest way to get back your
investment in Product Launch Formula, which is one of the reasons I wanted to do this
for you.
Another reason you might want to do this is, a lot of times people are, they're hesitant
to promote someone else's stuff because it's like, you've got your list you've built up.
You've built up this list of prospects, or this list of clients, and you just want to hold
them to yourself and not let them get out of your grasp. That's one way to think about
it and it's a pretty, sort of a scarcity-driven way. A little more abundant way, or I think a
more accurate way to think about it is, first of all, if they're on your list, it's likely they're
on other people's list as well.

Your people are the same way. They're not just on your list. They're on other people's
